text:
Created attachment 193386
patch to update the port

- Update 0.058 -> 0.059
Changes: http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/WYANT/PPIx-Regexp-0.059/Changes
- add LICENSE_FILE_*
- "portlint -AC" just warns about non-empty $FreeBSD$ tag.
- testport of poudriere 3.2.99.20180328 runs ok at 11.1-release-amd64, perl 5.26.2
- Buil-in perl tests in a clean jail say: "PASS".
